name.description: The name of the DNS A record.

records.description: A set of IP addresses assigned to the DNS A record.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

ttl.description: The time to live (TTL) for the DNS A record, in seconds.

zone_name.description: The name of the private DNS zone this record belongs to.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
